turns.transcript: My laptop will not connect to the guest network here at the cafe.
turns.speaker: primary

turns.transcript: It says authentication failed even after I reset the password.
turns.speaker: primary

turns.transcript: I have a call in ten minutes so I'm a little pressed for time.
turns.speaker: primary

turns.transcript: Could you just tell me if the router on your end is down?
turns.speaker: primary

turns.transcript: Okay, I'll switch to my phone for now, thank you.
turns.speaker: primary

notes: IT support call from a busy coworking cafe, someone talking over, 2.5s gaps (1:1 with Flux).
